name: Standard New Hire Onboarding
description: Default onboarding plan for all new individual contributors.

tasks.title: Provision laptop & accounts
tasks.description: Order standard hardware kit and provision M365, GitHub, VPN.

tasks.title: Send welcome email & day-1 schedule
tasks.description: Personalized welcome from hiring manager with day-1 agenda.

tasks.title: Schedule buddy intro chat
tasks.description: 30-min intro chat between buddy and new hire on day 1.

tasks.title: Complete required compliance training
tasks.description: Code of Conduct, Information Security, Privacy Foundations.

tasks.title: Introductions across team & adjacent teams
tasks.description: Schedule intro 1:1s with at least 5 colleagues.

tasks.title: First production change shipped
tasks.description: Small but meaningful first ship to celebrate week 4.

tasks.title: 30-day onboarding check-in with HR
tasks.description: Confirm onboarding success and surface blockers.
